prose: The benzene frontier orbitals calculation reports a HOMO–LUMO gap of 6.6310857 eV, obtained with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF, tier 'standard', density fitting enabled). The calculation ran in the gas phase (no solvent; explicit continuum off) for neutral singlet benzene (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO energy: −7.0468329 eV, LUMO energy: −0.41574728 eV.
